criteria.name: AI Integration Level
criteria.description: Extent to which AI features are incorporated into the app's functionality.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Average time users spend on the app daily.

criteria.name: User Base Size
criteria.description: Total number of active users on the platform.
criteria.sources: Company press releases, market research reports.

criteria.name: Privacy Measures
criteria.description: Effectiveness of the app's data protection and privacy policies.
criteria.sources: Privacy policy documents, third-party privacy assessments.

criteria.name: Innovation Score
criteria.description: Degree of novelty and uniqueness in the app's features and user experience.
criteria.sources: App reviews, industry awards, expert analyses.
